title: İK Analitik Dashboard
description: ISO 30414 uyumlu iş gücü analitikleri — personel, devir, kıdem

aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL

trend.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= :_periodStart AND FINISH_DATE <= :_periodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID), 0)

trend.select: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= :_prevPeriodStart AND FINISH_DATE <= :_prevPeriodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID), 0)

aggregate.select: 1.0 - (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= :_periodStart AND FINISH_DATE <= :_periodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID), 0))

aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL
VALID = 1 AND START_DATE >= :_periodStart AND START_DATE <= :_periodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28)

trend.where: VALID = 1 AND START_DATE >= :_prevPeriodStart AND START_DATE <= :_prevPeriodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28)

aggregate.where: VALID = 1 AND FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= :_periodStart AND FINISH_DATE <= :_periodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28)

trend.where: VALID = 1 AND FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= :_prevPeriodStart AND FINISH_DATE <= :_prevPeriodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28)

aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: ISNULL(oc.NICK_NAME, 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[BRANCH] b ON b.BRANCH_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].BRANCH_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[OUR_COMPANY] oc ON oc.COMP_ID = b.COMPANY_ID

aggregate.select: ISNULL(b.BRANCH_NAME, 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: CASE [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' ELSE 'Diğer' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: POSITION_STATUS = 1 AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID > 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio WHERE eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL)
aggregate.groupBy: CASE [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' ELSE 'Diğer' END

aggregate.where: POSITION_STATUS = 1 AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID > 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio WHERE eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL)

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 1 THEN '0-1 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 3 THEN '1-3 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 5 THEN '3-5 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 10 THEN '5-10 Yıl' ELSE '10+ Yıl' END AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value
aggregate.where: FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 1 THEN '0-1 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 3 THEN '1-3 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 5 THEN '3-5 Yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, START_DATE, GETDATE())/365.25 < 10 THEN '5-10 Yıl' ELSE '10+ Yıl' END

aggregate.select: FORMAT(START_DATE, 'yyyy-MM') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value
aggregate.where: VALID = 1 AND START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND START_DATE >= :_periodStart AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28)
VALID = 1 AND FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= :_periodStart AND FINISH_DATE <= :_periodEnd AND ISNULL(EXPLANATION_ID,0) NOT IN (18,26,28)
